title: Oral presentation: structure and signposting
subtitle: Guide your listener through a talk.
overview: Tell the listener where you are going.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Voy a dividir mi presentación en tres partes.
I am going to divide my presentation into three parts.

items.es: Voy a dividir mi presentación en tres partes.
items.en: I am going to divide my presentation into three parts.

items.es: En primer lugar, hablaré del problema general.
items.en: First of all, I will talk about the general problem.
Then I will present two possible solutions.

items.es: Pasemos ahora a las consecuencias prácticas.
items.en: Let us now move to the practical consequences.

items.es: Para cerrar, resumiré mi posición personal.
items.en: To close, I will summarize my personal position.
